# AI-smell pivot-cluster words — single source of truth.
# One phrase per line. Lines starting with '#' are comments.
# Consumed by tests/hooks/response-discipline.bats _check_pivot_cluster.
# Referenced by rules/common/output-discipline-voice.md (row 8 — pivot cluster).
#
# The check fires when density exceeds 1 pivot per 5 prose lines on long content
# (≥20 prose lines). Short responses are exempt — insufficient mass to judge.
however
on the other hand
that said
nevertheless
nonetheless
